name: Jasmine Night Recovery Oil
short: An overnight facial oil blending jasmine, marula, and camellia to repair, soften, and replenish the skin barrier.
description: A luxurious overnight facial oil designed to work in synergy with the skin’s natural repair cycle. Jasmine absolute, cold-pressed marula, and camellia seed oils deliver a concentrated dose of omega fatty acids 3, 6, and 9, while bisabolol calms visible redness. Wake to skin that feels supple, replenished, and quietly luminous — never greasy.
benefits: Supports overnight barrier repair and moisture retention
Reduces the appearance of redness and stress fatigue
Non-comedogenic and suitable for all skin types
Hand-blended in Provence in batches of 200
usage: Warm 4–5 drops between palms and press into clean skin as the final step of your evening routine. Use nightly or as a weekly intensive treatment.
